name: knudg
description: Agent-facing Knudg orchestration for live retrieval and write-candidate nudges.

interface.longDescription: Spawn bounded Knudg sub-agent work, build sanitized task profiles, search the pinned live backend, return compact nudger verdicts, and offer explicit write candidates without running a background MCP process.
defaultPrompt: Run Knudg live nudge for this task.
Offer a Knudg write candidate for this solved path.
